# size

**Instance Property**

The size of the “slice” of noise samples contained in the noise map relative to the unit coordinate space of the noise object it was created from.

## Declaration

```swift
var size: vector_double2 { get }
```

## Discussion

If you later generate a texture image from the noise map with the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/SpriteKit/SKTexture] class, this size is also the pixel dimensions of the texture to generate.

This property is read-only; you define the size of a noise map when creating it with the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKNoiseMap/interpolatedValue(at:)] initializer.

## Inspecting a Noise Map

- **origin**: The position of the “slice” of noise samples contained in the noise map relative to the unit coordinate space of the noise object it was created from.
- **sampleCount**: The width and height of integer grid for which the noise map contains sampled noise values.
- **isSeamless**: A Boolean value indicating whether the noise map’s output can repeat seamlessly in all directions.
